notes: Window: 17-24 Jul 2026. AMENDED TdF stage 19 (Fri 24 Jul, Gap-Alpe d'Huez): was UNVERIFIED with estimated 11:30 UTC start / 15:00 UTC finish. Official ASO route time now published (cyclingstage stage-19 page): start 14:00 CEST = 12:00 UTC, finish ~17:35 CEST = 15:35 UTC, 128 km, final climb Alpe d'Huez 13.8 km @ 8.1% (21 hairpins). Amended time->12:00 UTC, endTime->15:35 UTC, confidence medium->high, updated summary.

AMENDED F1 Belgian GP (Sun 19 Jul, Spa): venue was 'TBD'. formula1.com + Wikipedia confirm race Sun 19 Jul 15:00 CEST = 13:00 UTC (44 laps, Spa-Francorchamps), quali Sat 18 Jul 16:00 local. events.json time 13:00 UTC was already correct - filled venue -> 'Circuit de Spa-Francorchamps, Belgia', added a summary + verification fields. The ESPN F1 Friday-mis-date quirk (source-quirks) did NOT bite this weekend; board shows the right race day. Viaplay streaming correct per rights map.

AMENDED Corales Puntacana Championship (16-19 Jul, ongoing): streaming reverted to Viaplay AGAIN (4th consecutive run) - re-patched to HBO Max (Sport)/Eurosport. WBD holds ordinary PGA Tour rights in Norway from 2026 (majors The Open/US Open + DP World Tour stay Viaplay). Root cause is structural: build-events re-applies the sports-config golf Viaplay default on every rebuild, clobbering the verified streaming list (it preserves a deep url but not the platform list). Verify can only re-patch events.json each run.

CHECKED (no change) Gstaad ATP QF Ruud v J.M. Cerundolo (today, Fri 17 Jul): result not yet published at run time; the match was verified 16 Jul with the published order of play and remains as-is (2nd on Roy Emerson Arena, not before ~13:30 CEST / 11:30 UTC). Left confirmed.
